diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,128 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and sets up routing with a default SmartRouter containing RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallbacks.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter.
+- Simple note: Default constructor instantiates SmartRouter with [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter] as fallback routers.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Core Hono base class providing request handling, routing delegation, error/not-found handling, and methods like get/post/put/delete/all/patch/on/use/route/basePath/mount/fetch/request/fire.
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, H, HandlerInterface, Schema, Env, Handler, Next, compose, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, COMPOSED_HANDLER, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, HonoOptions.
+- Simple note: Uses #addRoute internally to push handlers to router and maintains routes array; #dispatch calls router.match and composes handlers.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for PatternRouter.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-exports PatternRouter from router module.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements PatternRouter using precompiled RegExp patterns for route matching with wildcard and parameter support.
+- Names noticed: Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, Route, PatternRouter, emptyParams.
+- Simple note: Converts paths with parameters to RegExps in add(); matches by regex test in match(); handles wildcard trailing patterns.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for LinearRouter.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-exports LinearRouter from router module.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements LinearRouter with linear route matching supporting wildcards and parameterized paths with optional lookahead patterns.
+- Names noticed: Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, Rout eRegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, emptyParams, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe.
+- Simple note: Linear scan of routes array; handles named parameters with optional regex patterns via lookahead; throws UnsupportedPathError for label+star combinations.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: Exports main RegExpRouter plus prepared-router for runtime-instantiation optimization.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements RegExpRouter using Trie with regex compilation for high-performance route matching with wildcard coverage.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, match, ParamAssocArray, Trie, HandlerWithMetadata, nullMatcher, wildcardRegExpCache, buildWildcardRegExp, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware.
+- Simple note: Builds matcher once in buildAllMatchers() using Trie; stores routes internally until built; uses cached wildcards.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines Matcher type and implements match function for RegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, emptyParam, match.
+- Simple note: Returns [[handlers], paramStash] by matching against cached regex and static map.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements PreparedRegExpRouter for runtime-precompiled router with embeddable regex and relocate maps.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, HandlerData, Matcher, MatcherMap, StaticMap, RelocateMap, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: Allows constructing from precomputed matchers/relocateMap; supports adding paths post-construction.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Implements Node class for Trie structure with regex string building for path-to-regex conversion.
+- Names noticed: ParamAssocArray, Context, Node, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, regExpMetaChars, compareKey.
+- Simple note: insert() parses path tokens into children tree; buildRegExpStr() constructs regex with indexed capture groups.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Implements Trie class for organizing routes into token tree and generating compiled regex.
+- Names noticed: Context, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, Trie, ParamIndexMap.
+- Simple note: Groups named parameters into regex tokens; delegates to Node for tree insertion and regex generation.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for SmartRouter.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-exports SmartRouter from router module.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements SmartRouter as fallback router manager that delegates to first successful router from list.
+- Names noticed: Result, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Tries each router sequentially; caches active router and switches after first match found.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module export file for TrieRouter.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-exports TrieRouter from router module.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements TrieRouter using recursive node tree search for route matching.
+- Names noticed: Result, Router, checkOptionalParameter, Node, TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Uses Node.search() to traverse tree and collect all matching handler-sets via BFS queue.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Implements Node class for TrieRouter tree structure with method handlers and pattern matching.
+- Names noticed: Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, Node, emptyParams, hasChildren.
+- Simple note: insert() builds tree with patterns; search() uses queue to traverse and match multiple patterns.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Provides shared test suite runner for all routers with common test cases covering basic routing, parameters, wildcards, and edge cases.
+- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, ParamIndexMap, Params, Router, runTest, task, suite, skipTask.
+- Simple note: Defines beforeEach setup to instantiate router and provide match wrapper with params extraction.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests PatternRouter including common cases plus duplicate param rejection and trailing slash handling differences.
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, PatternRouter, runTest.
+- Simple note: Skips unsupported tests (duplicate param self, trailing slash); asserts trailing slash normalization.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests LinearRouter including common cases plus multi-match limitations and trailing slash handling.
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, LinearRouter, runTest.
+- Simple note: Skips tests unsupported by LinearRouter including multi-match params with wildcards and complex regex patterns.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests RegExpRouter including common cases plus ambiguous path detection and static/dynamic ordering rules.
+- Names noticed: ParamStash, UnsupportedPathError, RegExpRouter, runTest.
+- Simple note: Enforces no duplicate param names in parent/child; rejects ambiguous label patterns.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests SmartRouter using default [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter] stack against common cases.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest.
+- Simple note: Default configuration exercises fallback delegation behavior.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests TrieRouter against full common case suite with multi-match and wildcard handling.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest.
+- Simple note: Passes all common tests including multi-match scenarios.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests Node class (low-level Trie structure) with insert/search operations and multi-match ordering.
+- Names noticed: Node.
+- Simple note: Extensive tests for patterns, wildcards, regex params, duplicate params, sort order, and multi-match behavior.
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

This is a benchmark task where I need to create a comprehensive read/write ledger document. Let me break down the steps:

1. Create the bench-artifacts directory
2. Read all the listed files
3. Create a markdown file with sections for each file
4. Add a cross-file checklist

Let me start by creating the directory and then reading all the files.
